title: stelis virgulata
intro: Stelis virgulata, also known as the virgulate stelis, is a flowering plant species in the orchid family. It is native to Central and South America and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
